title: The Survivors Keep Falling
description: Nami is pulled into Enel’s escape plan while the remaining fighters try to understand how to stop the coming disaster.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this scene centers on Enel, Eneru, Nami, Sanji, Usopp. Nami is pulled into Enel’s escape plan while the remaining fighters try to understand how to stop the coming disaster.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: Damn it! What is that dog doing....!?

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: In the real trial of iron!

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: Don't be in a hurry, my friend...

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: Think about it after you've eliminated me!

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: Eight men and two animals remaining...

summary: Nami is pulled into Enel’s escape plan while the remaining fighters try to understand how to stop the coming disaster.
